pi_items.source: Verified from export_result.sh where REPORT_PATH is hardcoded.
Verified from export_result.sh python block where target_email is hardcoded.
Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which calculate counts for these 5 folders using standard Maildir directories.
Verified from verifier.py which uses this value to score reported counts against actual folder counts.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real emails sourced from the SpamAssassin public mail corpus. The target report path '/home/ga/Documents/mailbox_health_report.txt' and recipient 'ops-director@company.com' are strictly enforced by the export script. The expected evaluation folders (inbox, junk, drafts, sent, trash) and the count_tolerance of 10 are confirmed via the evaluation scripts.
